# Open Canvas

Full component vocabulary. No fixed structure. Compose freely.

## When to use

- Lessons that don't fit any standard template pattern
- Experienced teachers who want full control over structure
- Revision sheets, mixed-format lessons, or unusual combinations

## Not ideal for

- First-time users — start with a structured template
- Lessons where a defined pedagogical arc is important

## Layout

Single column at all breakpoints. Components render in plan order with no sidebar or fixed structure.
